## Default Permission

Default permissions for uncloud-biometric: allows all five plugin commands.

#### This default permission set includes the following:

- `allow-status`
- `allow-is-enrolled`
- `allow-enroll`
- `allow-unlock`
- `allow-clear`

## Permission Table

<table>
<tr>
<th>Identifier</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>


<tr>
<td>

`uncloud-biometric:allow-clear`

</td>
<td>

Enables the clear command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`uncloud-biometric:deny-clear`

</td>
<td>

Denies the clear command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`uncloud-biometric:allow-enroll`

</td>
<td>

Enables the enroll command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`uncloud-biometric:deny-enroll`

</td>
<td>

Denies the enroll command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`uncloud-biometric:allow-is-enrolled`

</td>
<td>

Enables the is_enrolled command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`uncloud-biometric:deny-is-enrolled`

</td>
<td>

Denies the is_enrolled command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`uncloud-biometric:allow-status`

</td>
<td>

Enables the status command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`uncloud-biometric:deny-status`

</td>
<td>

Denies the status command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`uncloud-biometric:allow-unlock`

</td>
<td>

Enables the unlock command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>
